title: hieracium villosum subsp. ovalifolium
intro: Hieracium villosum subsp. ovalifolium, also known as woolly hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family, Asteraceae, characterized by its woolly leaves and stems. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium villosum subsp. ovalifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
